narrative:
Scioto-South (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,319 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.1 percentage points.
